sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁד שׁד

Transliteration: shad shôd

Phonetic: shad

BDB Definition:

  1. breast, bosom, (female) breast
    1. breast (of woman)
    2. breast (of animal)
    3. breast (of both human and animal)

Origin: probably from H7736 (in its original sense) contracted

TWOT entry: 2332a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
